📌 IoT in Transit

The IoT system for our city's public transportation just crashed 🚨.

I was wrong to think that handling real-time data ingestion would be straightforward 🤦‍♂️.

1️⃣ Data ingestion is the backbone of

2️⃣ Scalability is key to handling real-time
The fundamental idea behind a real-time IoT system is to process data as it happens 📊.

The Problem: IoT in Transit matters now
Core Concept: Real-time data processing
How It Works: Scalable data ingestion
Best Practices: Fault-tolerant system design
Common Mistakes: Inadequate testing
Key Takeaway: Scalability is crucial
Most engineers underestimate the importance of fault-tolerant data ingestion in IoT systems 📉.

Best practices dictate that production systems should prioritize scalability and reliability 🚀.

I finally understood that common mistakes, such as inadequate testing, can have severe consequences 🚨.
